<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after SPACE
print("Last action result:", last_action_result)
if last_transition:
    before = last_transition.before_frame
    after = last_transition.after_frame
    # Compare segmentation node counts
    before_nodes = before.segmentation['nodes']
    after_nodes = after.segmentation['nodes']
    print(f"Before nodes: {len(before_nodes)}, After nodes: {len(after_nodes)}")
    # Check if anything changed
    changed = False
    for i, (bn, an) in enumerate(zip(before_nodes, after_nodes)):
        if bn['color'] != an['color'] or bn['pixels'] != an['pixels'] or bn['boundary'] != an['boundary']:
            print(f"  Node {i} changed: {bn['color']}({bn['pixels']}) -> {an['color']}({an['pixels']})")
            changed = True
    if not changed:
        print("No visible changes detected")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
